fields.name: Employee No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a number for the employee.

fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip:
Every absence entry has a unique entry number.
The entry number cannot be changed because the absence has been registered.

fields.name: From Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the first day of the employee's absence registered on this line.

fields.name: To Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the last day of the employee's absence registered on this line.

fields.name: Cause of Absence Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a cause of absence code to define the type of absence.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the absence.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity associated with absences, in hours or days.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item or resource is measured, such as in pieces or hours. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item or resource card is inserted.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip: Specifies if a comment is associated with this entry.

fields.name: Quantity (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity associated with absences, in hours or days.

fields.name: Qty. per Unit of Measure
fields.tooltip: If the number in this field is different from 1, it means that a unit of measure other than the base unit setup on the Human Resources Setup card is used in the registration that the absence entry refers to.
